description: Prepare Tor Browser for an OPSEC-safe OSINT collection by setting the security level to 'Safer'. Navigate to 'https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Macaca_nigra_self-portrait_large.jpg' and download the image to /home/ga/Documents/evidence_media.jpg. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/forensic_metadata.txt containing the Camera model and Exposure time found in the image metadata. Bookmark the page with the exact title 'OSINT Evidence Source'.
